parsed.role: Remote Lead AI Engineer & Technical Architect
parsed.company_summary: Bold Business is an AI-first U.S. based global workforce solutions company that builds AI-Amplified Talent™, custom AI agents, and automation systems for clients like AT&T, JP Morgan, and Verizon.
SuperPlane is building the AI-native control plane for platform engineering. They are an early-stage, small, ambitious open-source company that ships fast and uses AI heavily.
Stripe is a company building the financial infrastructure of the internet, handling millions of transactions per day.

must_have_skills: ReactJS OR VueJS OR AngularJS OR MVC
parsed.company_summary: Doctors.net.uk, a subsidiary of M3 Inc., is the UK's largest professional network of doctors with over 245,000 members. M3 EU provides digital solutions across healthcare, life sciences, and pharmaceuticals.

Metriport is an open-source data intelligence platform that helps healthcare organizations access and exchange patient data in real-time. They have multi-million ARR, 100+ customers, and backing from top VCs.
red_flags: Uses 'olympian-level work ethic' language — similar to 'rockstar/ninja' culture signals, indicating potential burnout culture.
Founders work six days a week from the SF office — suggests expectations of extreme hours.
Daily stand-up at 7:30am PST Mon-Fri — early mandatory meeting every day.
Unlimited PTO paired with 'we work hard' and founders working six days a week — typical unlimited PTO concern where actual time off may be discouraged.
Salary not disclosed AND the company is private or unknown.

parsed.company_summary: Nextdoor is a social networking platform where neighbors connect to share trusted information, give and get help, and build real-world connections. It operates in more than 305,000 neighborhoods across 11 countries.

must_have_skills: Go OR C# OR Java OR Kotlin OR Rust
parsed.company_summary: Madhive is the leading independent operating system for modern TV advertising, powering campaigns for over 30,000 small and medium businesses per day. It is a B2B scale-stage company valued at $500M+.

Metriport is an open-source data intelligence platform that helps healthcare organizations access and exchange patient data in real-time. They have multi-million ARR, 100+ customers (including Amazon One Medical), and backing from top VCs.
red_flags: Uses 'olympian-level work ethic' language — similar to 'rockstar/ninja' culture signals, indicating potentially unsustainable expectations.
Founders work six days a week from the SF office — suggests a culture that may expect excessive hours.
Asks 'why can't it be done in 3 days?' when a project is estimated at 3 weeks — indicates unrealistic time pressure expectations.
Mentions 'hacker at heart' and 'what rules should be broken' — potential signal of weak process/accountability culture.

parsed.location: New York, South Florida, Los Angeles (2026)
parsed.company_summary: Atria is a membership-based preventive health care practice with 60+ in-house physicians, operating in New York, South Florida, Los Angeles (2026), and via 24/7 telemedicine globally. They also run a nonprofit research institute focused on preventive care.

parsed.company_summary: Atomus is a technology-driven Managed Security Service Provider (MSSP) built for Aerospace and Defense, providing cybersecurity compliance software delivered as managed services. Their customers include hypersonic aircraft companies, satellite and space mission systems companies, and AI/software companies.
